unresolvedStages.reason: The formula coefficient is exact, but the live Base Damage source used for shield health is not confirmed.
The self-referential shield-health and duration dynamic identifiers have not been assigned executable modifier semantics.
The live shield-health rounding boundary is not confirmed.
The ordering of shield modifiers, incoming mitigation, depletion, expiry, and the Mana refund is not established.
The client row supplies the attack-power coefficient, but the live base-damage or attack-power roll selected by the server is not confirmed.
The decoded dynamic modifier WP_Item_Gear_SW2_02_PC_DamageDown has not been assigned an executable operation.
The live rounding boundaries and damage pipeline order are not confirmed.
The target defense to mitigation curve and its place in the damage pipeline are not calibrated.
The attack-power source used for healing and its live roll selection are not confirmed.
HealEffect is present in the formula rows, but its exact operation and ordering are not yet materialized.
The live healing rounding boundaries and modifier order are not confirmed.
The conditions that expose a third Swift Healing cast are not established by the two reviewed magnitude rows.
